creator: vedran@miletic.net
text:
Installation of man page was removed in ee2842de6f5779181a94ed701d96fb5e22a0ffac. Is there a particular why that happened?

Anyhow, it would be useful to include both pandoc.1 and pandoc-lua.1, but not pandoc-server.1 as the package is compiled with Lua support and without server mode.
